ddls:
CREATE TABLE "swimming_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., 100 Y Free) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Freestyle, Breaststroke) */,
  "event_distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the event (e.g., 100, 50) */,
  "event_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the distance (e.g., Y for yards, M for meters) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the event */,
  "event_category" TEXT /* Category of the event (e.g., Open, Junior, Senior) */,
  "event_gender" TEXT /* Gender-specific events (e.g., Male, Female, Mixed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "swimmers" (
  "swimmer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each swimmer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the swimmer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the swimmer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the swimmer */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the swimmer */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the swimmer belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the swimmer */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the swimmer in meters */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the swimmer in kilograms */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach assigned to the swimmer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the swimmer registered with the federation */,
  "swimmer_status" TEXT /* Current status of the swimmer (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("swimmer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_swimmers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_swimmers_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* The date the team was founded */,
  "team_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head coach of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "competition_date" TEXT /* Date of the competition */,
  "competition_location" TEXT /* Location of the competition */,
  "competition_type" TEXT /* Type of competition (e.g., National, Regional, Local) */,
  "competition_level" TEXT /* Level of the competition (e.g., Senior, Junior) */,
  "registration_open_date" TEXT /* Date when registration opens */,
  "registration_close_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes */,
  "expected_participants" INTEGER /* Expected number of participants */,
  "registration_fee" TEXT /* Registration fee for the competition */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the organizing entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_events" (
  "competition_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition-event pair */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Timed Finals, Preliminaries) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., Scheduled, In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES swimming_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_events_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heats" (
  "heat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heat */,
  "competition_event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition-event pair */,
  "heat_number" INTEGER /* Number of the heat */,
  "heat_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the heat */,
  "heat_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the heat */,
  "heat_status" TEXT /* Status of the heat (e.g., Scheduled, In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heats_competition_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_event_id") REFERENCES competition_events ("competition_event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lanes" (
  "lane_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lane */,
  "heat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the heat */,
  "lane_number" INTEGER /* Number of the lane */,
  "lane_status" TEXT /* Status of the lane (e.g., Available, Occupied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lane_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lanes_heat_id FOREIGN KEY ("heat_id") REFERENCES heats ("heat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "lane_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lane */,
  "swimmer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the swimmer */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken by the swimmer */,
  "flags" TEXT /* Flags indicating significant performance markers (e.g., S, PB, SB) */,
  "improvement" TEXT /* Improvement percentage compared to previous performance */,
  "place" TEXT /* Place in the event */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score in the event */,
  "nisca_score" INTEGER /* NISCA score for the event */,
  "reaction_time" TEXT /* Reaction time at the start of the race */,
  "split_times" TEXT /* JSON array of split times for the race */,
  "final_time" TEXT /* Final time of the race */,
  "time_validation_status" TEXT /* Status of time validation (e.g., Valid, Under Review, Disqualified) */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., Final, Preliminary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_swimmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("swimmer_id") REFERENCES swimmers ("swimmer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_lane_id FOREIGN KEY ("lane_id") REFERENCES lanes ("lane_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Coach, Swimmer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., Active, Locked, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view results) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., swimmers, results) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., Success, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_results" (
  "historical_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical result */,
  "swimmer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the swimmer */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken by the swimmer */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the result */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "place" TEXT /* Place in the event */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score in the event */,
  "nisca_score" INTEGER /* NISCA score for the event */,
  "reaction_time" TEXT /* Reaction time at the start of the race */,
  "split_times" TEXT /* JSON array of split times for the race */,
  "final_time" TEXT /* Final time of the race */,
  "time_validation_status" TEXT /* Status of time validation (e.g., Valid, Under Review, Disqualified) */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., Final, Preliminary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_results_swimmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("swimmer_id") REFERENCES swimmers ("swimmer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_results_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES swimming_events ("event_id")
)
